title: Endgame Dragon
description: Eyes of ender require wither stars and echo shards to craft
body: To move the Ender dragon fight later into the endgame, each eye of ender requires an ender pearl, a blaze powder, a nether star, and an echo shard to craft. It's that simple. This mod is recommended in combination with [Better Bosses](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-bosses).
